description_long: This figure depicts an adult wearing a full-body jumpsuit with a hood pulled over the head, concealing the hair. The face is covered by a striking, theatrical mask with exaggerated features and bold colors, giving a mysterious or intimidating appearance. The jumpsuit is detailed with multiple seams, pockets, and reinforced areas, suggesting utility or tactical use. Accessories include gloves, sturdy boots, a holster or pouch on the thigh, and a visible armband, all contributing to a rugged, prepared look. The overall attire and mask evoke imagery associated with heist or urban tactical scenarios. The figure's stance is upright and ready, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description: An adult in a hooded jumpsuit and theatrical mask, accessorized with gloves, boots, and utility gear, standing upright. The attire and mask suggest a tactical or heist-themed urban character.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, hood, detailed jumpsuit, gloves, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, the holster on the thigh, and the armband.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back harness, hood, and the full length of the jumpsuit and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mask's profile and utility details on the jumpsuit.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded utility jumpsuit with gloves, tactical harness, and accessories
